title: GitHub SCIM-provisioned user state
description: Per-user lifecycle state from a GitHub Enterprise organization SCIM endpoint. Reconciled on a schedule; one record per user per run.

scim_user_id.description: SCIM-assigned stable user id (the SCIM 2.0 id attribute).

user_name.description: SCIM userName attribute — typically the IdP-canonical username.

active.description: SCIM active flag. false indicates deprovisioned.

external_id.description: Optional SCIM externalId (the IdP user identifier mirrored into GitHub).

primary_email.description: Primary email if exposed by the SCIM provider.
